title: mentha × villosa var. sapida
intro: Mentha × villosa var. sapida, also known as pineapple mint, is a variety of the peppermint plant with a distinctive pineapple-like flavor and aroma. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, relieve headaches, and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Mentha × villosa var. sapida include its potential to improve respiratory health, boost the immune system, and provide relief from nausea and vomiting. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
